languages.text: Трупная вытяжка, которую рискнул{mf||а} испить Вольный Торговец, оставила после себя лишь недомогание и слабость.
The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.
languages.original_text: Трупная вытяжка, которую рискнул{mf||а} испить Вольный Торговец, оставила после себя лишь недомогание и слабость.

traits.locale_text: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.
The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.
The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.
The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.

languages.text: 行商浪人冒险喝下的那剂腐化提取液，只为其换回了一身的不适与虚弱。
languages.original_text: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人冒险喝下的那剂腐化提取液，只为其换回了一身的不适与虚弱。

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in içmeyi göze aldığı çürük özütü, geride kırgınlık ve zayıflıktan başka bir şey bırakmadı.
languages.original_text: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'in içmeyi göze aldığı çürük özütü, geride kırgınlık ve zayıflıktan başka bir şey bırakmadı.

languages.text: Tout ce que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} a récolté en buvant cet extrait de putréfaction, c'est une sensation de malaise et de faiblesse.
languages.original_text: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.

traits.locale_text: Tout ce que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} a récolté en buvant cet extrait de putréfaction, c'est une sensation de malaise et de faiblesse.

languages.text: El extracto de carroña que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente se arriesgó a beber solo le ha otorgado malestar general y debilidad.
languages.original_text: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.

traits.locale_text: El extracto de carroña que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente se arriesgó a beber solo le ha otorgado malestar general y debilidad.

languages.text: Der Extrakt, den {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} getrunken hat, bewirkt nur Übelkeit und Schwäche.
languages.original_text: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.

traits.locale_text: Der Extrakt, den {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} getrunken hat, bewirkt nur Übelkeit und Schwäche.

languages.text: ローグトレーダーが危険を冒して飲んだ腐敗の抽出液が、あとに残したのは倦怠と衰弱だけだった。
languages.original_text: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.

traits.locale_text: ローグトレーダーが危険を冒して飲んだ腐敗の抽出液が、あとに残したのは倦怠と衰弱だけだった。
